category_sources: Official docs getting-started page describes installing and using ekphos for notes.
source_facts.description says it is a terminal-based markdown research tool inspired by Obsidian.
display_name_sources: Official docs page title uses Ekphos Docs.
docs_sources: Official dedicated docs domain docs.ekphos.xyz provides getting-started documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/hanebox/ekphos; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official docs installation page references cargo and source build for the Rust project.
source_facts.description identifies markdown research and terminal use.
